items.title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 28

items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Eala upsets Wimbledon champion Swiatek in historic win for Philippines, No. 2 seed Rybakina also out
items.summary: The 21-year-old Eala found Centre Court at Wimbledon a bit more accommodating on Saturday (July 4) when she beat defending champion Iga Swiatek 7-6 (9), 6-2 in the third round a...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Seales praises Sri Lanka for 'brave decision' to bat first
items.summary: "As a batting unit, we had a good score. So bowlers have a good, big responsibility to make the game for us," Sonal Dinusha says after the second day's play
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
